name: mitsubishi
description: Mitsubishi Electric is a global leader in power semiconductor technology, offering industry-leading IGBT modules, DIPIPMs, IPM modules, and SiC MOSFETs. With over 90 years of innovation, Mitsubishi Electric delivers high-performance power solutions for industrial automation, renewable energy, electric vehicles, and home appliances.
longDescription: Founded in 1921, Mitsubishi Electric has been at the forefront of power electronics innovation. The company's power semiconductor division provides cutting-edge solutions including the renowned DIPIPM (Dual-In-Line Package Intelligent Power Module) series, high-power IGBT modules for industrial applications, and next-generation SiC devices. Mitsubishi Electric's products are characterized by exceptional reliability, advanced packaging technology, and industry-leading efficiency. The DIPIPM series has shipped over 100 million units worldwide, making it the most trusted choice for home appliance motor control. As an authorized Mitsubishi Electric distributor, BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive technical support and reliable supply chain services.

coreProducts.description: High-power IGBT modules for industrial drives, renewable energy, and traction applications

coreProducts.description: Dual-In-Line Package Intelligent Power Modules for home appliances and low-power motor drives

coreProducts.description: Intelligent Power Modules with integrated drive and protection for industrial applications

coreProducts.name: SiC MOSFETs
coreProducts.description: Silicon Carbide MOSFETs for high-efficiency, high-frequency power conversion

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor for Mitsubishi Electric?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is an authorized distributor for Mitsubishi Electric. We maintain a direct partnership with Mitsubishi Electric and provide genuine products with full manufacturer warranty and technical support. Our authorization ensures you receive authentic Mitsubishi power semiconductor products with complete documentation, application notes, and after-sales service. We can provide authorization certificates upon request.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us to verify our distributor credentials or request a quotation for Mitsubishi Electric products.

faqs.question: What are Mitsubishi Electric's main product categories?
faqs.answer: Mitsubishi Electric specializes in four main product categories: (1) IGBT Modules - High-power modules including NX series and standard series for industrial drives up to several megawatts; (2) DIPIPM - The world's most popular intelligent power module for home appliances, with over 100 million units shipped; (3) IPM Modules - Industrial intelligent power modules with higher power ratings for servo drives and inverters; (4) SiC MOSFETs - Next-generation silicon carbide devices for high-efficiency applications. Mitsubishi's products are known for exceptional reliability and innovative packaging technology.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories or contact our FAE team for product recommendations based on your application.

faqs.question: What makes Mitsubishi DIPIPM special?
faqs.answer: Mitsubishi DIPIPM (Dual-In-Line Package Intelligent Power Module) is the industry standard for home appliance motor control: (1) Market leader - Over 100 million units shipped worldwide; (2) Integrated design - Built-in HVIC for single-supply operation, bootstrap diodes, and comprehensive protection; (3) Compact size - Dual-in-line package fits standard PCB layouts; (4) Cost-effective - Reduces external component count and design time; (5) Proven reliability - Field-proven in billions of operating hours; (6) Wide range - Voltage ratings from 600V to 1200V, current ratings from 5A to 50A; (7) Easy design - Minimal external components required. DIPIPM is the ideal choice for air conditioners, refrigerators, washing machines, and other home appliances.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose DIPIPM for home appliance applications up to 2.2kW; contact us for selection guidance.

faqs.question: What industries does Mitsubishi Electric serve?
faqs.answer: Mitsubishi Electric serves four major industry segments: (1) Home Appliances - DIPIPMs are the industry standard for air conditioners, refrigerators, washing machines, and other appliances; (2) Industrial Automation - IGBT modules and IPMs for servo drives, CNC machines, robotics, and factory automation; (3) Renewable Energy - High-power modules for solar inverters, wind power converters, and energy storage systems; (4) Transportation - Traction modules for electric vehicles, hybrid vehicles, and railway systems. Mitsubishi's diverse portfolio and proven reliability make it a trusted partner across these industries.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for industry-specific application support and reference designs.

faqs.question: What technical support does BeiLuo provide for Mitsubishi Electric products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo provides comprehensive technical support for Mitsubishi Electric products: (1) Product selection - Helping choose the right Mitsubishi modules for your application including DIPIPM selection for appliances or IGBT modules for industrial drives; (2) Application circuit design - Reviewing inverter designs, gate drive circuits, and protection schemes; (3) Reference designs - Access to Mitsubishi's extensive library of reference designs for home appliances and industrial applications; (4) Simulation support - Providing SPICE models and thermal simulation data; (5) PCB layout review - Optimizing layout for switching performance and EMI reduction; (6) Debugging support - Troubleshooting issues during prototype bring-up and testing; (7) Training - Technical seminars and training on Mitsubishi products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for technical support and application guidance.

faqs.question: How can I request samples or get a quotation for Mitsubishi Electric products?
faqs.answer: You can request samples or quotations through multiple channels: (1) Online form - Submit your inquiry through our website contact form with your application details; (2) Email - Send your requirements including part numbers, quantities, and application information to our sales team; (3) Phone - Call our customer service hotline for immediate assistance; (4) WeChat - Add our official WeChat account for quick communication. For sample requests, please provide project information, estimated annual usage, and technical requirements. Our team responds to inquiries within 24 hours during business days. Standard lead time for samples is 2-3 weeks from Japan; production quantities typically 6-10 weeks.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us today to request samples or get a quotation for your Mitsubishi Electric product needs.
